title: Fix CONTRIBUTING_AGENT.md documenting non-existent deferred status
description: CONTRIBUTING_AGENT.md documents a 'deferred' status and its workflow transitions, but this status doesn't exist in the current .kanbus.yml configuration. The file needs to be regenerated after the default config is updated to use backlog.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Regenerated CONTRIBUTING_AGENT.md. Now shows backlog workflow correctly.
